prompt: Senior backend engineer with strong distributed systems experience.

criteria.label: Distributed systems design

anchors.1: Cannot reason about partitioning or failure modes.
anchors.3: Designs a workable system with some gaps under failure.
anchors.5: Designs for partition tolerance, backpressure, and graceful degradation.

criteria.rationale: Core to the role: the JD calls out distributed systems experience.

anchors.3: Participates in incident response when asked.
anchors.5: Drives incidents to resolution and follow-up.

criteria.label: Youthful energy and drive (age)

anchors.1: Low energy, set in their ways.
anchors.5: High energy, fresh out of school.

criteria.rationale: We want a young, energetic team.
